headline: Assessing Molina Healthcare (MOH) Valuation After Mixed Short And Long Term Share Performance
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Molina Healthcare (MOH) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a small move over the past day, a gain over the past week and month, but a decline across the past 3 months and year. The company reports annual revenue of US$43.6b and net income of US$472.0m from its Medicaid, Medicare, Marketplace and Other segments, serving low income members across multiple U.S. government sponsored programs. See our latest analysis for Molina...
